title: 8Pcs Football Party Balloons, 18Inch Soccer Foil Balloon Football Shape Mylar Foil Balloons Decorations for Men Soccer Fans Sport Game Theme Birthday Party Decorations Supplies
features: Football Foil Balloons: You will get 8 pieces 18 inch large football foil balloons in black and white, enough to decorate your football party.

Perfect Size & High Quality: These cute and funny soccer balloons are made of high quality aluminum foil, all the football balloons are safe, durable, non-toxic, strong and and reusable. Just fill 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely.

Easy to Inflate: The football foil balloons have self-sealing valve does not need to be knotted for easy inflation and deflation. It can be inflated with air or helium. When filled with helium, the soccer foil balloons can float in the air; after filling, press the valve of the balloon to seal it. It can be reused. Do not throw away after use!

Repeated Use: The black white soccer ball balloons kit contains a straw that can be used to deflate the football foil balloon, simply insert the straw into the valve and press gently until the gas is completely expelled. After use, it can be folded and stored for reuse.

Perfect Football Party Decorations: The football foil balloons can be hung on walls, windows, ceilings and doors, or placed on the floors or tables even any other places, suitable for soccer themed birthday party, gender display parties, photo props, etc. And they are very suitable for the coming football game party decorations. Every soccer fan will like the intresting parties.
description: 8Pcs Football Foil Balloons Kit is Perfect for Football Games, Tailgate Party, Sports Game Day Party, Soccer Theme Birthday Party, and other indoor and outdoor activities. Specifications: ⚽ Material: Aluminium Foil ⚽ Color: Black White ⚽ Size of Football Foil Balloons: 18 inch ⚽ Quantity: 8 pcs What You Will Get: 🏆 18" Black White Football Foil Balloons 8pcs Features: 🎈 Super cute and shine football foil balloons with metallic texture appearances. 🎈 The soccer foil balloons are made of high-quality foil, which is safe and can be used multiple times. 🎈 These football party decoration balloons can be filled with air or helium, the latex balloons can float when filled with helium. 🎈 There are holes on the bottom and top of the soccer foil balloons, you can use the balloon ribbon to hang the balloons or stick it on the wall. 🎈 Suitable for a variety of party activities: school sports game / football games/soccer theme birthday party/other party events, etc. Warm Reminder: ⚠️ Please don't over inflate the football foil balloons, 80%-90% is the best. ⚠️ Keep the balloons away from the flame, lemon juice or sharp objects, avoid exploding. ⚠️ Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. ⚠️ Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error.
